name: Amsterdam Open MRI Collection (AOMIC)
description: Three open multimodal 3T MRI datasets (ID1000, PIOP1, PIOP2) totaling over 1,300 participants, with structural, diffusion, resting-state and task fMRI plus rich demographics and psychometrics. Task fMRI includes emotion-matching and face-perception (Hariri-style) paradigms, making AOMIC a strong resource for individual-differences research on face processing, emotion, and social-affective perception.
citation: Snoek L, van der Miesen MM, Beemsterboer T, van der Leij A, Eigenhuis A, Scholte HS (2021). The Amsterdam Open MRI Collection, a set of multimodal MRI datasets for individual difference analyses. Scientific Data, 8, 85.

publications.title: The Amsterdam Open MRI Collection, a set of multimodal MRI datasets for individual difference analyses
